manifest.name: Meeting Detector

name: Meeting Detector

releases.author: yut0takagi
releases.description: Require Obsidian 1.4.0; use activeWindow timers for pop-out window compatibility; lint fixes.

releases.author: yut0takagi
releases.description:
## Meeting Detector v0.1.0

Initial release.

### Features
- Auto-detect Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams on macOS
- Modal popup with actions: start recording, create meeting note, or both
- Template-based meeting note creation with `{{date}}`, `{{time}}`, `{{app}}` variables
- Meeting end detection with configurable actions (stop recording / notification / nothing)
- Full settings UI for all configuration options
